title: Summarize Social Media Post
scenario: Summarize a social media post (approximately 500 characters) into a single sentence summary. The summary should capture the main idea and key message of the post. Assume the reader has no prior knowledge of the topic. The summary should be concise and focused on the most important information.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated summary is a single sentence and does not exceed 20 words.
Verify that the summary captures the main idea and key message of the post.
Evaluate the conciseness of the summary, ensuring it provides the most important information without unnecessary details.
Assess the readability of the summary, considering factors such as grammar, spelling, and formatting.
